books.description: اتْبَعْ جَمَاعَةَ النَّمْلِ فِي هَذَا الْكِتَابِ؛ فَمِنَ الْمُؤَكَّدِ أَنَّهَا سَوْفَ تَشْغَلُ الْقُرَّاءَ الصِّغَارَ. هَذَا الْكِتَابُ وَاحِدٌ مِنَ الْكُتُبِ الْأَرْبَعَةِ فِي سِلْسِلَةِ 'الْحَيَوَانَاتُ مِنْ حَوْلِنَا'.

books.title: أَسْتَمِعُ إِلَى جَسَدِي
books.description: كُلٌّ مِنَّا لَدَيْهِ جَسَدٌ رَائِعٌ، وَلَكِنْ هَلْ سَبَقَ لَكَ أَنِ اسْتَمَعْتَ إِلَى مَا يُخْبِرُكَ بِهِ جَسَدُكَ؟

books.title: شَيْءٌ مَا تَحْتَ سَرِيرِي
books.description: تَخْتَبِئُ أَشْيَاءُ غَرِيبَةٌ تَحْتَ سَرِيرِي أَحْيَانًا. هَلْ تُحِبُّ أَنْ تَعْرِفَ مَاذَا وَجَدْتُ اللَّيْلَةَ الْمَاضِيَةَ؟

books.title: مَاذَا تَرَى نادية؟
books.description: تَرَى نادية الْعَدِيدَ مِنَ الْأَشْيَاءِ الْجَمِيلَةِ حَوْلَهَا، هَلْ تَرَاهَا أَنْتَ كَذَلِكَ؟

books.title: आम का पेड़
books.description: इस नन्ही लड़की को बड़े से आम के पेड़ पर छुपने में बहुत आनंद आता है।  ज़रा सोचिये कि उसे आख़िर में कौन ढूँढ़ लाता है?

books.title: भीमा गधा
books.description: भीमा की एक समस्या है। सुबह-सुबह उसकी नींद नहीं खुलती। एक नन्ही दोस्त उसकी मदद करती है। क्या आप जानना चाहेंगे कि भीमा की नींद कैसे खुली?

books.title: लाल बरसाती
books.description: मनु के पास नई बरसाती है। वह उसे पहनने के लिए मचल रहा है, लेकिन बारिश है कि आती ही नहीं है!

books.title: लालची चूहे जी
books.description: लालच बुरी बला है पर यह चूहे जी को कौन समझाए?

books.title: नन्हे मददगार
books.description: घर को रंगना है बेहद मज़ेदार! पर फाटक को कौन-सा रंग दें?

books.title: ऊपर देखो!
books.description: चिड़ियाँ और चमगादड़! पतंग और जहाज़! आप इस अनोखी दुनिया की कितनी खोज कर सकते हैं? तो तैयार हो जाइए, इस निराली पुस्तक के साथ कुछ निराली बातों का पता लगाने के लिए!

books.title: सोना की नाक बड़ी तेज़
books.description: हमारी नन्ही सोना की तो आदत है हर किसी की मदद करने की। याद है न उसने पिछली बार अपनी माँ की सहायता की थी, उससे पहले अपने बाबा की मदद की थी। आज वह चाचा के यहाँ गयी है, वही जो चुस्की बनाते हैं। चलिये देखते हैं, सोना वहाँ क्या करती है?

books.title: दीदी का रंग बिरंगा खज़ाना
books.description: कचरे के ढ़ेर से घिरे हुए बच्चे मौज मस्ती कैसे करें? लेकिन एक दिन कहीं से दीदी आईं और बच्चों के जीवन में रंग लाई।किताबें जो उनकी दोस्त हो गईं।

books.title: कहानी केलों की!
books.description:
श्रींगेरी श्रीनिवास के खेतों में बढ़िया मीठे केले उगते थे। 
पर कोई भी उन्हें खाना नहीं चाहता था। 
इस मीठी कहानी को पढ़ कर पता लगाइये कि श्रींगेरी ने केलों का क्या किया।

books.title: गुल्ली का ग़ज़ब पिटारा
books.description: गुल्ली के पास है एक ग़ज़ब का बक्सा, जिसमें से निकल कर आती हैं, तरह-तरह की चीज़ें। पर गुल्ली इन सब चीज़ों का क्या करता है? चलो, पता लगाएँ! और फिर शायद तुम भी बनाना चाहो अपना ऐसा ही ख़ास बक्सा।

books.title: किस्सा खीर का
books.description: मीरा के पापा किशमिश लेने के लिये बाज़ार गये थे। घर लौटे तो पकी हुर्इ खीर ग़ायब थी। खीर किसने खार्इ?

books.title: शूकैट थूकैट
books.description: कमला की नई शूकैट जिससे भी मिलती है, उस पर हमला कर देती है! दोस्त, दादा, शिक्षक, बकरियाँ... हर कोई उससे नफरत करते हैं। अब वो क्या करेंगे?

books.title: آلو، مالو، کالو
books.description: ایک دن مالو باغیچے سے آلو لانے گیا۔ اس کام میں اس کی کس نے مدد کی؟ یقینا، کالو! پڑھئے مالو اور کالو کے بارے میں جب انہیں ایک صبح کچھ آلو ملے!

books.title: کچھ گڑ بڑ ہے
books.description: امّو اسٹیج پر جانے سے پہلے اپنی لائینیں کس طرح یاد کرتی ہے۔ آپ بھی سنئے اور مسکرائے۔سب گڑبڑ ہے۔

books.title: میرا بلّہ کہاں ہے؟
books.description: کچھ چیزیں سامنے ہوتی ہیں لیکن دکھائی نہیں دیتیں۔ میرا بلّہ کہاں ہے؟ اس کہانی میں شاید اس بچّے کے ساتھ کچھ ایسا ہی ہوا۔

books.title: گُلّی کا خاص بکسہ
books.description: گُلّی کے پاس ایک غضب کا بکسہ ہے۔ جس میں سے نکل آتی ہیں طرح طرح کی چیزیں۔ لیکن گُلی ان سب چیزوں کا کیا کرتا ہے؟ چلیے پتہ لگائیں۔ اور پھر شاید آپ بھی بنانا چاہو اپنا ایسا ہی خاص بکسہ۔

books.title: ایمن کا بستہ
books.description:
میں پیاری سی ایمن کا ساتھی ہوں۔ ہر دم اس کے ساتھ نظر آتا ہوں۔
وقت کے ساتھ ساتھ ہم دونوں بڑے ہورہے ہیں۔ میری اور ایمن کی دوستی کی یہ پیاری سی کہانی پڑھیے۔

books.title: حساب  اور میلا
books.description: لالی  اپنی پوری کلاس کےساتھ میلے گئی۔ بچوں نے حساب کیسے دوہرایا ،کیا آپ بتا سکتے ہیں؟

books.title: غصیلی اکّو
books.description: اکّو کا دن کافی خراب رہا جس کی وجہ سے اُسے بہت، بہت ہی زیادہ غصّہ آیا. اس کتاب کو پڑھیے اور جانیے کہ اس نے اپنے غصّے پر کس طرح قابو پایا. اورساتھ ہی یہ معلومات بھی حاصل کریں کہ جب آپ کو بہت، بہت ہی زیادہ غصّہ آئے تو آپ کو کیا کرنا چاہیے.

books.title: امی کب آئیں گی ؟
books.description: روجا کی ماں صبح سویرے کام پر چلی گئی۔ انھوں نے روجا سے رات کو سونے سے پہلے آنے کا وعدہ کیا ہے۔ روجا امی کے بغیر سارا دن کیا کرے گی؟

books.title: El regalo de Navidad de Sam
books.description: Sam desesperadamente quiere ver su regalo de Navidad. Pero está escondido en el lugar secreto. Entonces, ¿Qué hizo Sam?

books.title: ¡Es la hora del baño!
books.description: Acompaña a Chunnu y Munnu mientras se diviertan a la hora del baño. Es divertido leer en voz alta y la mejor manera de decir buenas noches.

books.title: El ejército de las burbujas
books.description: A Bunty no le gusta el jabón, por eso siempre se niega a limpiarse. Pero una noche tiene un sueño. ¿Qué pasa después entonces?

books.title: ¡Hay algo debajo de mi cama!
books.description: Algunas veces ocurren cosas extrañas debajo de mi cama. ¿Te gustaría saber lo que encontré la otra noche?

books.title: Croac
books.description: Hay una rana en la clase, advierten alumnas y alumnos. Una rana está comiendo el almuerzo de Masterji. Una rana está sentada en la silla de Masterji. Pero Masterji no va a caer en las bromas de sus alumnos hoy.

books.title: El Árbol
books.description: El viaje de un árbol de una semilla pequeñita a un árbol grande.

books.title: El efecto dominó
books.description: Mamá dice Nivi a apagar la olla de presión después de tres silbados. ¡Pero Nivi quiere leer su nuevo libro en vez de eso! Encuentre cómo ella manejar las dos tareas hábilmente.

books.title: El pájaro elefante
books.description: ¡ Munia sabía que el gigantesco pájaro elefante con una pluma no había tragado el caballo aunque fue bastante grande para tragar uno !  ¿ Entonces, dónde había desaparecido el caballo ? Un cuento sobre un pájaro mágico y una niña valiente y curioso.

books.title: La misteriosa amiga en línea
books.description: Shree adora aprender cosas nuevas en la computadora. ¡Con ella puede acceder a juegos y a redes sociales! Cuando conoce a una amiga nueva en la red, se emociona mucho. Pero, ¿esa amiga es quien dice ser? Descúbrelo en este thriller cibernético.

books.title: Raconte Moi... Maintenant ! Les Couleurs
books.description: Often an inquisitive child asks his parents about the colours or shapes that he sees around himself. The 'Tell me ... now!' Series describes how interesting the questions and answers turn out.

books.title: Un Homme Très Grand
books.description: A man is so tall that everything around him is too short or small. How does he resolves things?

books.title: Le jour de la coupe de cheveux annuelle
books.description: Sringeri Srinivas avait de très longs cheveux. Il voulait se les faire couper le jour de sa coupe de cheveux annuelle, mais personne n'était disponible. Tu ne devineras jamais qui lui est venu en aide ce jour-là. Bonne lecture !

books.title: Le Grand Bus Bleu
books.description: Ebei and his mother are waiting for the big blue bus. Where is it?

books.title: La Poule Et Le Millepatte
books.description: An adorable tale on why chicken and millipedes are enemies.

books.title: Attachez vos ceintures!
books.description: Arya a toujours rêvé de piloter. Prêt pour le décollage avec elle ? Attache ta ceinture!

books.title: Bintang Dah Tumbuh!
books.description: Bolehkah bintang tumbuh di bumi? Jo tak sabar hendak tahu.

books.title: Rumah Malar Yang Besar
books.description: Malar suka membina. Apa yang akan dia bina hari ini?

books.title: Cara Yang Lain
books.description: Anda tidak perlu pergi jauh untuk mengetahui keindahan rahsia alam - mereka semua ada di taman anda. Ketahui tentang benda yang bertentangan antara satu sama lain di alam sekitar.

books.title: Mesin Nenek yang Menarik
books.description: Sooraj dan neneknya SUKA mencipta! Sertailah mereka dalam pengembaraan terbaru: dengan menggunakan mesin untuk membuat barfi kelapa!

books.title: Sahana Bermain Muzik
books.description: Rumah Sahana terlalu sunyi. Bagaimanakah Sahana dapat memeriahkannya? Dia mula membuat muzik sendiri. Mari kita dengar.

books.title: Janice meneroka Chinatown
books.description: Janice bertolak ke Chinatown di Kolkata bersama Neneknya. Ikutilah Janice semasa dia menemui kekayaan warisan dari daerah ini.

books.title: Mencari Dinosaur
books.description: Jauh sebelum manusia berevolusi, dinosaur berkeliaran di Bumi. Mari kita ketahui lebih lanjut mengenai reptilia yang menakjubkan ini.

books.title: Apabila Saya Dewasa
books.description: Saya Papori dan saya akan menjadi seorang jurutera apabila dewasa. Buku ini adalah tentang semua perkara yang akan saya bina. Buku ini penuh dengan perkataan-perkataan tinggi, tetapi ia juga penuh dengan pengembaraan besar. Mari sertai saya!

books.title: Kawan-kawan Di Bawah Matahari Musim Panas
books.description: Musim panas hampir berakhir dan Nimmi mengerjakan tugasan untuk ibunya. Tugas yang terbaru-menghantar telur ke jirannya, Kakak. Namun tugas membosankan ini mungkin menjadi cara terbaik untuk meluangkan masa pada hari itu.

books.title: Siapa Curi Senyuman Abang?
books.description: Abang tidak suka bermain beberapa hari ini. Adakah kerana kawan raksasa barunya, Dukduk, yang selalu bergantung dengannya? Tidak ada seorang pun dalam keluarga yang mengambil serius tentang keadaan Abang.  Tetapi Chiru tahu bahawa terdapat perkara yang lebih mendalam daripada apa yang dilihat dengan nyata. Kisah tentang kesan kemurungan yang berlarutan.

books.title: De rode regenjas
books.description: Manu heeft een nieuwe regenjas. Hij kan niet wachten om hem aan te doen, maar de regen laat op zich wachten... en wachten... en wachten.

books.title: Ik wil die!
books.description: 'Niet die!' zegt Anil's moeder wanneer hij voor iets vraagt. 'Niet die!' zeggen ook alle verkopers in de markt. Dat maakt een kleine jongen heel erg boos!

books.title: De 7 kleuren van een regenboog
books.description: Kijk rond! Zie je de 7 kleuren van de regenboog rond je?

books.title: Het is de schuld van de kat
books.description: De jongen in dit verhaal heeft zijn huiswerk niet gemaakt. Dat is de schuld van een stoute kat. Klinkt het als een dom excuus? Lees wat er is gebeurd en je zal zien hoe het ene tot het andere heeft geleid, en tot het andere, en weer wat anders...

books.title: Het is de schuld van de poes!
books.description: De jongen in dit verhaal kon zijn huiswerk niet doen vanwege zin ondeugende kat. Klinkt dat als een slechte smoes? Lees het verhaal en ontdek wat er gebeurde. Je zult zien dat het ene tot iets anders leidt en dat weer tot iets anders, en dat weer...

books.title: Gulli's doos met dingen
books.description: Gulli heeft een klein bruine doos waar hij vanalle dingen in bewaart zoals knopen en sleutels. Maar wat doet hij ermee? Ontdek het, en misschien wil jij dan ook je eigen speciale doos!

books.title: The Elephant-bird
books.description: The story is about a little girl named Munia with a handicap, she can’t walk well and she can’t run. All the villagers think the elephant bird ate the horse and Munia is the only one who knows that the elephant bird would never eat someone

books.title: De auto die vloog
books.description: Vast in het drukke verkeer van Delhi, voelt een auto een beetje magie. Rijd mee met de bestuurder en passagier, en voel de magie.

books.title: Het verhaal van de Wc
books.description: Een plasje of een grote boodschap zijn altijd zwaar werk! Maar vraag je jezelf wel eens af hoe dit er vroeger uitzag? En zijn ze anders in andere landen? Maak je klaar voor een inkijkje op Wc's door de ruimte en tijd heen.

books.title: De luie spin, Anansi.
books.description: Waarom spinnen lange dunnen benen hebben.

books.title: Prietena mea cea mai bună
books.description: Ai dori și tu să ai un prieten special? Citește cartea aceasta și vei descoperi că deja ai!

books.title: Cadoul de Crăciun al lui Radu
books.description: Radu vrea să-și primească acum cadoul de Crăciun! Dar e ascuns într-un loc secret. Vrei să știi ce a făcut Radu?

books.title: Cei trei pi-soi
books.description: Celor trei pisoiasi le este frica de câinele din vecini.El vrea să se joace cu ei, dar de câte ori il văd, ei o iau la fugă.De ce credeti că le este atat de frică de el?

books.title: Pisica e de vină!
books.description: Băiețelul din povestea aceasta nu și-a făcut tema de casă din cauza unei pisici neastâmpărate. Este aceasta doar o scuză? Citiți povestea ca să aflați ce s-a întâmplat cu băiețelul și cum o întâmplare duce la alta și la alta și la alta...

books.title: Maşinile minunate ale bunicii
books.description: Sooraj şi bunica lui sunt FOARTE inventivi! În această aventură cei doi folosesc maşini simple ca să facă o prăjitură cu nucă de cocos. Alăturaţi-vă lor!

books.title: Noapte bună, Tinku!
books.description: Lui Tinku, căţeluşul de la ferma lui Mangu, nu îi este somn deloc. Aşa că se hotărăşte să hoinărească prin noapte, în căutare de prieteni noi.

books.title: O carte pentru Puchku
books.description: Puchku a rămas fără cărţi de citit, însă descoperă o mulţime de cărţi pe rafturile de sus ale unei biblioteci. Dar Puchku e micuţă, iar rafturile sunt înalte. Va reuşi ea oare să ajungă la cărţile ei iubite?

books.title: Ursuletul Babloo
books.description: Viata ursuletului Babloo este plina de aventuri.. La propriu! Alatura-te aventurilor nocturne ale lui Babloo si descopera secretele ursilor din Himalaya!

books.title: Istoria toaletelor
books.description: Treaba mică şi treaba mare sunt, de fapt, treburi foarte importante. Dar te-ai întrebat vreodată cum arătau toaletele în vechime? Sau dacă există ţări în care sunt altfel de toalete decât cunoşti tu? Pregăteşte-te pentru o excursie în spaţiu şi în timp, în lumea toaletelor!

books.title: Sâmburele de mango fermecat
books.description: Într-o zi, Tara şi Arun descoperă un ziar vechi în casa bunicii lor. Îl deschid şi pornesc într-o călătorie prin istorie în cursul căreia descoperă o fetiţă care caută un sâmbure de mango fermecat şi un băieţel care încearcă să îl telegrafieze din India la Londra.

books.title: Πόσα;
books.description: Κάποια ζώα και πουλιά θέλουν να σε συναντήσουν! Το μόνο που ζητούν είναι να μετρήσεις μερικά πράγματα για αυτά. Θα το κάνεις;

books.title: Οι Φίλοι Μου
books.description: Έχω πολλούς φίλους. Τους αγαπώ όλους αλλά μια την αγαπώ πολύ-πολύ!!

books.title: Ο χονδρός βασιλιάς
books.description: Τρέξε με τον χονδρό βασιλιά πίσω απο το λεπτό σκυλί !

books.title: Για όλα φταίει η γάτα!
books.description: Το αγόρι σε αυτή την ιστορία δεν μπορούσε να τελειώσει τις ασκήσεις του εξαιτίας μιας άτακτης  γάτας. Ακούγεται σαν μια διακαιολογία; Λοιπόν, διαβάστε τι συνέβη σε αυτό το αγόρι και θα δείτε πως ένα απλό πράγμα μπορεί να οδηγήσει σε κάτι άλλο, και κάτι άλλο, και κάτι άλλο...

books.title: Τι θα γίνει σήμερα;
books.description: Μια συγκινητική ιστορία για παιδιά που χρειάζονται βοήθεια. Πώς μπορείς να βοηθήσεις;

books.title: Η πανέξυπνη μύτη της Σόνα
books.description: Της Σόνα της αρέσει να βοηθάει τους άλλους. Στο πρ΄ωτο βιβλίο, βοήθησε τον πατέρα της. Στο δεύτερο βιβλίο, βοήθησε τη μητέρα της. Τώρα, η Σόνα επισκέπτεται τον θείο της που φτιάχνει γρανίτες. Τί θα κάνει εκεί;

books.title: Ο παππούς και το ραδιόφωνο
books.description: Η οικογένεια των ψαριών ήταν ένα τεράστιο παλιό ραδιόφωνο στο σαλόνι τους, αλλά τα μικρότερα ψάρια ποτέ δεν άφηναν τον καημένο Παππού να το πλησιάσει, μιας και ήταν απορροφημένα να το ακούν τα ίδια. Μέχρι που μια μέρα, ο Παππούς επέμεινε να ακούσει τις ειδήσεις, και άκουσε μια πολύ σημαντική ανακοίνωση...

books.title: Ο άντρας που πίστευε πως ήταν πιο έξυπνος από τη γυναίκα του: παραδοσιακό παραμύθι από τη Νορβηγία
books.description: Πριν πολλά-πολλά χρόνια ζούσε στη Νορβηγία ένας στριφνός γκρινιάρης γεωργός που τον λέγανε Κατσούφη Γκας. Ο Κατσούφης Γκας δεν ήταν μονάχα γκρινιάρης αλλά και αλαζόνας και πίστευε πως ήταν εξυπνότερος από όλο τον κόσμο, και ιδιαίτερα από τη γυναίκα του. Διαβάστε αυτό το συναρπαστικό και αστείο παραμύθι από τη Νορβηγία, για να ανακαλύψετε πόσο έξυπνος ήταν τελικά ο Γκας!

books.title: Ο Θαυμαστός κόσμος του Φιμπονάτσι
books.description:
Σχεδόν χίλια χρόνια πριν, ένας Ινδός μελετητής ονόματι Αμαχάντρα ανακάλυψε μια συναρπαστική ακολουθία αριθμών. Έναν αιώνα αργότερα, η ίδια ακολουθία τράβηξε την προσοχή του Ιταλού μαθηματικού, Φιμπονάτσι, ο οποίος έγραψε για αυτήν.

Η ακολουθία Φιμπονάτσι, όπως ονομάστηκε προς τιμήν του, ήταν αρκετά απλή- αυτό όμως που την έκανε πραγματικά συναρπαστική ήταν ότι η ακολουθία αυτή επαναλαμβανόταν πολλές φορές στη φύση, στα λουλούδια, στα κοχύλια, στα αυγά, στους σπόρους και στα αστέρια...
Διάβασε, λοιπόν, το βιβλίο και ανακάλυψε περισσότερα για την μοναδική αυτή ακολουθία!

books.title: ବହୁତ ବଡ଼! ବହୁତ ଛୋଟ!
books.description: ଶାନୁ ଏତେ ବଡ଼ ହୋଇଗଲାଣି ଯେ, ମା’ ଏବେ ତାକୁ ଉଠେଇ ପାରିବେ ନାହିଁ, ହେଲେ ଏତେ ଛୋଟ ଅଛି ଯେ, ଏକା ସ୍କୁଲ ଯାଇପାରିବ ନାହିଁ । ଚାଲ ଏହି ଛୋଟ ଗପଟିକୁ ପଢ଼ି ଦେଖିବା କି, ତୁମେ କ’ଣ ଏତେ ବଡ଼ ହୋଇଗଲଣି ଯେ, ଏହାକୁ ତୁମେ ନିଜେ ପଢ଼ି ପାରିବ ନା ତୁମେ ବହୁତ ଛୋଟ ଅଛ ଯେ, ତୁମକୁ ଆଉ ଜଣେ କିଏ ପଢ଼ିକରି ଶୁଣାଇବେ ।

books.title: ମୋଡ଼ିମୋଡ଼ିକିଆ ଗେଣ୍ଡା
books.description: ବିଭିନ୍ନ ଆକୃତିର ଢାଞ୍ଚାରେ ଭରପୂର ଆମ ପ୍ରାକୃତିକ ଜଗତ। ଯେମିତି ରେଖା, ବିନ୍ଦୁ, ମୋଡ଼ିମୋଡ଼ିକିଆ ଇତ୍ୟାଦି। ନିଜ ଚାରିପଟକୁ ତୁମେ ଦେଖ। ବିଭିନ୍ନ ଆକୃତିର ଢାଞ୍ଚା ତୁମ ନଜରରେ ନିଶ୍ଚିତ ପଡିବ।

books.title: ଓଲଟା କୁ ଜାଣ
books.description: ପ୍ରକୃତିର ବିସ୍ମୟକର ରହସ୍ୟ ଗୁଡ଼ିକୁ ଖୋଜିବା ପାଇଁ ତୁମକୁ କୁଆଡ଼େ ଦୂରକୁ ଯିବାକୁ ପଡ଼ିବନି। ତମ ଘର ପାଖରେ ଥିବା ବଗିଚାରେ ହିଁ ସେସବୁ ମିଳିଯିବେ। ପ୍ରକୃତିରେ ଥିବା ବିପରୀତ ବୋଧକ ଶବ୍ଦକୁ ଶିଖିବା।

books.title: ଲୁଚକାଳି ଖେଳ!
books.description: ଲୁଚକାଳି ପରି ଏକ ସାଧାରଣ ଖେଳ ଏକ ମଜାଦାର ରୋମାଞ୍ଚକ ମୋଡ଼ ନେଲା ସାନିଆ ଜନ୍ମଦିନରେ, ଯେତେବେଳେ ଖେଳ ମଝିରେ ଏକ କୁକୁର, ବିଲେଇ ଓ ମହୁମାଛି ସାମିଲ୍ ହୋଇଗଲେ। ଲୁଚିଥିବା ସବୁ ସାଙ୍ଗମାନଙ୍କୁ କ’ଣ ସାନିଆ ଖୋଜି ପାଇଲା? ସାନିଆ ସାଥିରେ ଗଣିବା ଆରମ୍ଭ କରି ନିଜେ ଦେଖ!

books.title: ଚାଲ ବନେଇବା ଲେମ୍ବୁ ସର୍ବତ
books.description: ଆଠ ଜଣ ପିଲା ଉଦୁଉଦିଆ ଖରାରେ ଖେଳୁଥିଲେ। ସେମାନେ ରାଜୁ କକା ତିଆରି କରୁଥିବା ସର୍ବତ ପରି ଗୋଟେ ଜଗ୍ ସର୍ବତ ତିଆରି କରିବାକୁ ଭାବିଲେ ।ସେମାନେ ସର୍ବତ ପାଇଁ ଆବଶ୍ୟକ ହେଉଥିବା ଜିନିଷକୁ କେମିତି ମାପିଲେ? ସେମାନେ ସର୍ବତକୁ ସମାନ ଭାବରେ କିପରି ଭାଗ କଲେ? ଭଗ୍ନାଂଶର ଧାରଣାକୁ ଅତି ସହଜ ଭାବରେ ଗୋଟିଏ ସ୍ୱାଦିଷ୍ଟ ସର୍ବତ ମାଧ୍ୟମରେ ଏହି ଗପରେ ବୁଝାଯାଇଛି।

books.title: କୁଆଡ଼େ ଗଲା ନନ୍ଦିନୀ ?
books.description: କ୍ଷେତ ଘେରା ଘରଟିରେ ବଡ଼, ସାନ ଗୁଡି଼ଏ ଗାଈ ଅଛନ୍ତି I ମାଳିନୀକୁ ସେମାନଙ୍କୁ ପଡି଼ଆରେ ଚରାଇବା ପାଇଁ ନେବାକୁ ହେବ I ସେମାନଙ୍କୁ ଜଗୁଥିବା ବେଳେ ତା' ର ସମ୍ପର୍କୀୟ ସାନ ଭଉଣୀ କେଉଁଆଡ଼େ ଚାଲିଯାଏ I ତେଣୁ, ସେ ତାକୁ ଖୋଜିବାକୁ ବାହାରିପଡ଼େ I ସେ କଣ ତାକୁ ଖୋଜି ପାଇବ ? ଏହି ଗପଟିରେ ବଡ଼-ସାନ, ଛୋଟ-ବଡ଼, ଡେଙ୍ଗା-ବାଙ୍ଗରା ଇତ୍ୟାଦି ଶବ୍ଦ ଗୁଡି଼କ ବିଷୟରେ ଧାରଣା ଦିଆଯାଇଛିI

books.title: ଦିବ୍ୟାର ମାନଚିତ୍ରରେ କିଏ?
books.description: ଦିବ୍ୟାର ସମ୍ପର୍କୀୟ ଭାଇ ରବି ଖୁବ୍ ଶୀଘ୍ର ତାଙ୍କ ଘର ଗଜାପୁରକୁ ଆସିବ। ଏଥିପାଇଁ ଦିବ୍ୟା ଭାରି ଉତ୍ସୁକ ହୋଇ ଅନେଇ ରହିଥାଏ। କିନ୍ତୁ ସେ ଜାଣିପାରୁନି ରବି ତାଙ୍କ ଘର ପାଇବ କେମିତି! ଏଥିରେ ତା’କୁ ମାନଚିତ୍ରଟିଏ ସାହାଯ୍ୟ କରିବ କି?

books.title: ଛୋଟ ବଡ଼ ଜିନିଷ
books.description: ପୃଥିବୀ ଅନେକ ଜିନିଷକୁ ନେଇ ତିଆରି ; କିଛି ବଡ଼, କିଛି ଛୋଟ ତ କିଛି ମଧ୍ୟମ ଧରଣର। ଏଇଟି ଏକ ଗୁରୁତ୍ୱପୂର୍ଣ୍ଣ ବାର୍ତ୍ତା ବହନ କରୁଥିବା ଗୋଟେ ଛୋଟିଆ ବହି।

books.title: ସୁନାଠାରୁ ମୂଲ୍ୟବାନ ପଦାର୍ଥ
books.description: ଧାନ ଅମଳ କମିଯାଉଥିବାରୁ ପାତି ଓ ଆପ୍ପା ଖୁବ୍ ଚିନ୍ତିତ ଅଛନ୍ତି। ପାତି କିନ୍ତୁ ଏହାର ଏକ ସମାଧାନ ତାଙ୍କ କାଠ ବାକ୍ସରେ ଲୁଚାଇ ରଖିଛନ୍ତି। ଏ ରହସ୍ୟ ସୁନାଠାରୁ ମଧ୍ୟ ଅଧିକ ମୂଲ୍ୟବାନ। ପାତି ଦେଶୀ ଧାନ ବିହନ ଚାଷର ଉପାଦେୟତା ବିଷୟରେ ଯେଉଁ ଜ୍ଞାନ ଦେଇଛନ୍ତି, ଶେଷରେ ସାବି ଓ ସେଲ୍‌ଭା ତାହା ବୁଝି ଯାଇଛନ୍ତି।

books.title: ରାଜମୋହନା ଏବଂ ତାଙ୍କର କ୍ଷୁଦ୍ର ଜୀବଙ୍କର ବିଶାଳ ପୃଥିବୀ
books.description: ସବୁପିଲା ଶୋଇଥିବା ବେଳେ ମୋହନା ପିମ୍ପୁଡ଼ି  ଧାଡ଼ିକୁ ଲକ୍ଷ୍ୟ  କରିବାରେ ଲାଗିଥିଲା। ସେହି ଛୋଟ ମୋହନା ବଡ଼ ହୋଇ ଜଣେ କୀଟତତ୍ତ୍ଵଜ୍ଞ ବୋଲାଇଲେ। ରାଜମୋହନା କେଲୋଥ୍ ଙ୍କ ବିଷୟରେ ପଢ଼ ଏବଂ ତାଙ୍କର କ୍ଷୁଦ୍ର ଜୀବଙ୍କର ବିଶାଳ ପୃଥିବୀ ବିଷୟରେ ଜାଣ।

books.title: মেকুৰীৰ পোৱালী
books.description: এটা মেকুৰীৰ পোৱালীয়ে ঠেঙত দুখ পাইছিল। কোনোবাই তাক সহায় কৰিবনে?

books.title: কাছ আৰু শহাপহু
books.description: কাছ আৰু শহাৰ মাজত দৌৰ আৰম্ভ হ'ল।বাটত শহা শুই গ'ল আৰু কাছ আগুৱাই গ'ল। এনেতে কাছই সিংহক লগ পালে। আগলৈ কি হ'ব বাৰু?

books.title: আলু - মালু - কালু
books.description: এদিন মালুৱে আইতাকৰ শাক-পাচলি বাগানৰ পৰা আলু আনিছিল, কিন্তু সি এটাও আলু নাপালে ।  লুকুৱাই থোৱা আলুখিনি বিচাৰিবলৈ কালুৱে তাক সহায় কৰিলে ।

books.title: ৰীতুৰ দীঘলীয়া চিঠি
books.description: কনমানী ৰীতু কনমানী পাবলৈ ব্যগ্র হৈ আছিল। সেয়েহে তাই তালৈ এখন বিশেষ চিঠি পঠিয়ালে।

books.title: আন্ধাৰে কিনো কয়
books.description: আমাৰ অনুভৱবোৰ নো আচলতে কি? মৰমৰ যদি গোন্ধ থাকিলহেতেঁন তেন্তে কেনেকুৱানো গোন্ধালেহেতেঁন? যাদু বোলা কথাটোনো কি? এইয়া হৈছে দৈনন্দিন পৃথিৱীৰ সৰু সৰু ঘটনাবোৰত এভুমুকি। সিবোৰক এবাৰ ওচৰৰ পৰা চোৱা, কাণ উনাই কথাবোৰ শুনা আৰু প্ৰতিটো বস্তুৰে সৌন্দৰ্যক উদযাপন কৰা।

books.title: সত্যৰ দুষ্টামী
books.description: মাকৰ লগত সত্য পথাৰখনলৈ যোৱা সময়ত তোমালোকেও তাৰ লগত জাঁপ মাৰা, চুঁচুৰি যোৱা আৰু বগোৱাচোন। এই কাহিনীটোত আমাৰ চলন-ফুৰণৰ বিভিন্ন ধৰণ কৰণৰ বিষয়ে ধুনীয়াকৈ লিখা হৈছে।

books.title: ডাৱৰ আৰু নাই
books.description: আমাৰ অনুৰাধাই এইবাৰ বিহুত খুব ফুর্তি কৰিব। কিন্তু এয়া কি? বতাহৰ কোব আৰু এই বৰষুণজাক। ৰােৱাৰ নাম নলয়হে নলয়। তেন্তে কি তাই ঘৰতেই থাকিব নেকি বিহুতো?

books.title: পৰোপকাৰী কাউৰীজনী
books.description: কাউৰীজনী ধুনীয়া নহয়। তাই কুলীৰ নিচিনাকৈ গান গাবও নোৱাৰে আৰু ম’ৰাৰ নিচিনাকৈ নাচিবও নাজানে।কিন্তু তাইৰ গাত এনে এবিধ বিশেষ গুণ আছে যিটো আমি আয়ত্ত কৰিবলগীয়া। কিতাপখন পঢ়ক আৰু সেই বিশেষ গুণটো নির্ধাৰণ কৰক।

books.title: কেৱল মূৰ্খইহে  স্কুললৈ যায়
books.description: চামভাই কেতিয়াও বিদ্যালয়লৈ নাযায়। সি ভবা মতে বিদ্যালয় মূৰ্খৰ বাবেহে। এদিনাখন শিক্ষয়িত্রীয়ে চামভাক বিদ্যালয়লৈ লৈ গ’ল। মনে মনে চামভাৰ বৰ ভাল লাগিছে। কিন্তু পিছদিনা চামভাই আকৌ আহিব বিচাৰিবনে?

books.title: কালীৰ নাচিবলৈ মন
books.description: কালীয়ে মাথো নাচিব বিচাৰে। কিন্তু কেনেকৈ? তাৰ গাঁৱততো কোনো ল'ৰাই নানাচে - বিশেষকৈ ভাৰতনাট্যম। সপোন, আকাংক্ষা আৰু নিজৰ আশা-আকাংক্ষা আৰু আস্থাৰ বিষয়ে এটি প্ৰেৰণাদায়ক কাহিনী।

books.title: म्हजे इश्ट !
books.description: म्हजें खूप इश्ट आसात​. ते सगळेंच म्हाका आवडटात​. पूण सगळ्यांत चड आवडिचो कोण जाणा ?

books.title: हुशार सोना
books.description: सोनाच्या बापायन ताचेखातीर एक सोबीत खेळणे तयार केलां. ताणीं एका मेकांक कशी मजत केली हाची मनभुलोवणी काणी वाचात.

books.title: इंद्रधनुष्याचे ७ रंग
books.description: सरभोंवतणी पळय! तुका तुज्या सरभोंवतणी इंद्रधनुष्याचे सात रंग दिश्टी पडटात?

books.title: पावसांत गायतना
books.description: सुखिया काका फामाद गायक आशिल्लो. ताका दिनू मेळ्ळो जो ताचो शौकीन आसलो. तांची दोगांयची जोडी बरी जमली.

books.title: इल्लें सरबत करया !
books.description: आठ भुरगीं रखरखत्या वतांत खेळटात. तीं राजूमामान दिल्ले कृती नुसार लिंबाचें सरबत करूंक सोदतात. तीं जिनस कशे मेजतात? तीं तें सरबत सारखें कशें वाटून घेतात? अपूर्णांकाचे संकल्पनेची ही रुचीक पदार्थाची कृती वापरून वळख करून दिल्या!

books.title: जुई काकीचें बाय
books.description: अनू आनी ताची अावय जुई काकील्या नव्या बायक पळोवपाक तांगेर वतात. हाचेर आवय आनी काकी नाका जाल्लो बोवाळ करता. पूण अनू चित्ता की हें बाय सामके भोळे.

books.title: चला, बियो एकठांय करूया!
books.description: टुका, पोई आनी तांचो खास इश्ट इंजी कुतू सांगातान बियो एखठांय करूया. खरी मजा सुरू जाता, जेन्ना तिनुय इश्ट मेळटात चिचेचे झाड पच्चाक​.

books.title: मात्सो पासवर्ड दी!
books.description: मंजूक आपल्या चुलत भयणीच्या मॉबायलार खेळ खेळपाचो आसता. पूण ताका पासवर्ड आसता. हें पुस्तक म्हायती सांबाळून दवरपा खातीर पासवर्ड कसो चावयेचें काम करता तें सांगता. चड जाणून घेवपाक जाय जाल्यार हें पुस्तक उगडून पळयात. ताका पासवर्ड लागना.

books.title: आमचो सोबीत संवसार
books.description: मनशाक संवसारात येवून सुमार 2,00,000 वर्सां जालीं. पूण फाटल्या 250 वर्सांक आमी एक राकेस तयार केला, तो म्हणल्यार हवामान बदल. हो राकेस गिऱ्याक चड गरम करपाक लागला, आनी आमी आमचे बरोबर आमच्या रावपी जिवाक धोको निर्माण केला. आमी हांगा कशे पावले? आनी फुडें कितें जातलें? हवामान संकश्टा विशीं आमकां जाणीव कित्याक जावंक जाय हें ह्या बिगर काल्पनीक पुस्तकांत सांगलां.

books.title: मंगलयान - एक भोंवडी मंगळाची
books.description: मंगलयान नांवाच्या अंतरिक्षयानाचेर आमची ही भोवंडी. आमचो मुक्काम मंगळ. आमी चंद्राक फाटल्यान उडोवन सुर्याची दुसरी वट पळोवपाचो हो प्रवास करुया. चला वचुया.

books.title: I Can Climb! / हम चढ़ि सकैत छी
books.description: Here, a little boy learns to climb up. But can he climb down? This book is one of the four books in the 'Growing Up' series.    एकटा छोट बच्चा  ऊपर चढ़नाइ तs सीख जाइत अछि । मुदा ओ नीचा उतरि पाओत की?

books.title: गप्पू नाच नहि कए सकय छथि
books.description: कक्षा 1 ए'क सभ बच्चा जनैत अछि जे गप्पू नाचि नहि सकैत छथि। जखन सभ बच्चा अपन बामाँ हाथ उठबैत अछि, ओ दहिना हाथ उठबैत छथि। की? कोमल मैम गप्पूकेँ नचबाक लेल तैयार कऽ सकैत छथि। सभ किछु उन्टा होइतहु नचबाक खुशी पर आधारित एकटा कहानी।

books.title: स्कूलमे रानीक पहिल दिन
books.description: रानी स्कूलक अपन पहिल दिनमे की सभ देखैत छथि? हुनका केहन लागि रहल छन्हि?

books.title: हिलैत दाँत
books.description: बुनुक हिलैत दाँत नहि खसि रहल अछि। सीखू, कोना हिमालयक दन्तकथाक मदतिसँ बुनुक दाँत टुटैत अछि।

books.title: धोबिघट्टा दिवस
books.description: आजुक दिन मैरीक प्रिय समय थिक - कपड़ा धोबाक समय। मैरीक पड़ोसियासभसँ भेंट कऽ लिअ कारणजे ओ लोकनि कपडा धो रहल छथि आ निकलि जेताह फेर नव दिन काज शुरू करऽ लेल।

books.title: Singing in the Rain / बरखा मे गाएब
books.description:
Sukhiya Kaka was a famous singer. He met Dinoo who turned out to be his biggest fan. Together they made quite a pair!

सुखिया कका एकटा प्रसिद्ध गायक छलाह। हुनका दीनू डायनासोर सं भेंट भेलनि, जे हुनक सभसं पैघ प्रशंसक बनि गेलनि। दुनू मिलि कs कि जोड़ी बनौलनि!

books.title: एना सुलझल दूटा सखीक झगड़ा
books.description: चुन्नी आ पुतुल पड़ोसी आओर बहुत नीक दोस छथि। जखन हुनका सभक बीच झगड़ा होइत अछि, चुन्नी सोचैत छथि, अपन सखी संग एहि झगड़ाकेँ कोना सोझराबथि ।

books.title: नोवेल कोरोनावायरस ओ कोविड - 19
books.description: आउ, पता लगाबी जे होशियार कोना बनी। सुरक्षित रही आ नब कोरोनावायरसक समय एकदोसराक मदति करी।

books.title: लापता पानिक मामला
books.description: जखन रंजक गामक तालाब सुखा जाइत  अछि ओ लापता पानि के ढूढैक मिशन पर निकलि पड़ैत अछि। आनु जासूस रंजक सँग मिलि  के एहि लापता पानिक मामला के सुलझाबैत छी।

books.title: चिपकू! चिपकू! जंगल बचाउ!
books.description: ई कथा पहाड़ीक पृष्ठभूमि पर आधारित अछि जे देखबैत अछि जे साहस आ हिम्मतसँ कि प्राप्त कएल जा सकैत अछि। दिची, एकटा बहादुर भोटिया लड़की रहथि जे अपन प्रिय वृक्षसभकेँ बचबय चिपको आंदोलनमे भाग लेलन्हि। हुनकर गामक सभ व्यक्तिकेँ ई बूझल रहैन्ह जे वृक्ष हुनकासभकेँ जीवनमे सभटा महत्वपूर्ण वस्तु उपलब्ध करबय छन्हि। हिमालयक क्षेत्रमे जंगल तीव्र कटयलासँ अलकनंदा नदी १९७० मे  भयंकर बाढ़िक कारण बनल जाहिसँ आंदोलन जनमल जे वृक्ष बचबाय लेल चिपकबाक रस्ता देखयलक। छोट दिचीक आँखिसँ एहि हृदय छुअयवला कथा पढ़ी आ सीखी जे सामूहिक क्रियाशीलतामे  कि शक्ति छै।

books.title: Ezigbo enyi m
books.description: Ọ ga-amasị gị inwe enyi pụrụ iche? Lee n'ime akwụkwọ a ma ị ga-ahụ na ị nwere enyi pụrụ iche!

books.title: Azụ m! Mba, azụ m!
books.description: Obere akụkọ banyere ndị enyi atọ na azụ atọ dị nkọ!

books.title: Igụ anumanu ọnụ
books.description: Anụ ọhịa niile nọ n'oké ọhịa ka akpịrị na-akpọ nkụ! Soro ha mgbe ha nile na-aga ịṅụ mmiri.

books.title: Ka chifoo, Tinku
books.description: Otu obere nkịta nọ na nke Mangu adịghị ehi ụra. O kpebiri ịbanye n'abali ma zute ndị nwere mmasị ya.

books.title: Eze na emeghari
books.description: Ezé Bunu n'emeghari jụrụ ịpụta! Mụta otú, esi jiri obere enyemaka sitere na akuko ifo ndị Himalaya, Eze Bunu funahụru ya.

books.title: Nnukwu atụmatụ nke obere ahụhụ
books.description: Nke a bụ akụkọ banyere obere ahụhụ na nnukwu atụmatụ, na otú ịhụnanya ya maka ịgụ akwụkwọ si zọpụta ụbọchị

books.title: Ahụrụ m onwe m n'anya
books.description: Lota ka akwagala n'ụlọ ọhụrụ. Ọ maghị onye ọ bụla n'ebe ahụ. Ọ dịghị onye chọrọ ka ya na ya gwurie egwu. Lota nwere ike ịchọta enyi nke ya?

books.title: ọnụ ọchị nru ububa
books.description: Ezinụlọ Kavya si n'obodo ha gaa Bengaluru ya kpatara ọ bụ nwata nwanyị kachasị ọhụrụ na klas ya. Soro Kavya gaa ka ọ na-eleta ogige ntụrụndụ ebe ọ na-achọta njikọ pụrụ iche na nru ububa ma mee ka enyi ọhụrụ

books.title: Ihe banyere mmiri na efu efu
books.description: Mgbe tankị dị na obodo Ralu kpochara, ọ na-aga ozi iji chọta mmiri na-adịghị. Soro Ralu na ikpe ahụ.

books.title: Akụkọ banyere ụlọ mposi
books.description: Ma ị na-echekarị ụlọ mposi dị n'oge ochie? Ha dị iche na mba ndị ọzọ? Biko jikere ịhụ ụlọ mposi na ebe ndị ọzọ na oge!

books.title: ORE TI MO FERAN JU
books.description: Se o feran lati ni ore pataki? Wo inu iwe yii waa si ri wipe o ni ore pataki!

books.title: OJO AKOKO RANTI NI ILE-IWE
books.description: Kini Ranti ri ni ọjọ akọkọ ni ile-iwe? Kini ero re?

books.title: Wild cat! Wild cat!
books.description: Se alabapade orisirisi olongbo igbo ti orile ede india.

books.title: Awon Irinse Iyanu Ti Ammachi
books.description: Itan Yi Ni Soki: Sooraj ati iya-nla re FERAN sise awari! Da ara po mon won ninu irinajo awari won ti won seese se: nipa lilo awon irin ise ti ko tobi ju lati se  barfi lati ara agbon.

books.title: EYIN TI O O MI
books.description: Eyin Bunu to n mi ko  o lati jade! Ka bo ti ri, pelu iranwo Himalayan akotan, Eyin Bunu yo.

books.title: OMI IRUGBIN
books.description: Nigbati ojo ko ro, awọn ọdọmọkunrin ti abule naa lọ lati wa omi. Ọkan ninu wọn n mu omi pada

books.title: When Things Go Round and Round
books.description: Chintu feran nkan ti o yipo, gegebi Aye. wo iwe yi pelu Chintu ati awon ore re

books.title: Eerin Àti Ọ̀gà
books.description: A king sets a difficult task, but the reward is to marry the princess. Who will succeed Elephant or Chameleon ?

books.title: A stitch in Time
books.description: Ni akọkọ, awọ ti a ya ni ati lẹhinna, apoti irin-iloso ti o ni aṣiṣe ti ko tọ. Ọjọ ti bẹrẹ fun Shyam. Pẹlu ohun gbogbo ti nṣiṣe aṣiṣe lẹhin ti ẹlomiiran, Shrisha mu u lọ si Mela alatunse nibi ti o ti le ṣatunṣe fun ohunkohun.

books.title: 7 Colours of Rainbow
books.description: Tunula wona!Olina wolaba langi omusanvu ezamusoke

books.title: Too Big! Too Small!
books.description: Shamu munene nyo ku Ammi okusitula. Ate mutono nyo okugenda kusomero yeka. Oli muto nyo okusoma akataba weka? oba olimukulu okusoma nomuntu ? kabikule olabe...

books.title: I want that one
books.description: Maama wa Anil nagamba sikyekyo, Nabamadduuka Nebagamba sikyekyo. Ekyo nekiretera omulenzi okuba nga munyiivu.

books.title: Ebyuuma bya Ammachi Ebyewuunyisa
books.description: Sooraj ne jaaja we BAAGALA okuyiya! Wegate nabo mu lugendo lwabwe olwo kuvumbula: Nga bakozesa ebyuuma ebyangu okukola obundazi bwe binazi!

books.title: Nsobi Ya Kaapa
books.description: Omulenzi mu lugero luno teyasobola kumala omuwaka we olwa kaapa emu. Kale kiyulikika nga ekitaliyo naye? Naye musomeko olabe ekya mutukako ojya kulaba engeri ekintu ekimu wekitusa kukirara nekiraramr.

books.title: Neema analya ki leero?
books.description: Sisinkana Neema ayagala ennyo okulya. ebiserera, jamuns, tamarinds ezikawa, spinach- abyagala byonna! Wegate ku neema ngalya mumwaka gwona.

books.title: Wambuzi, Wambwa ne Wante
books.description: Find out why the dog runs towards a car and a goat away from it!

books.title: Enffa Y’Ensekere
books.description: Two young men accept a louse's hospitality. What happens next?

books.title: Omuwala Norah
books.description: Norah loves her doll and gets worried one day when she is not able to find it.

books.title: Inyanga nekepisi
books.description: Umfanyana othile uphiwa ikepisi eluhlaza ngumama wakhe. Suke umoya uyivuthuze ikepisi iyowela esihlahleni. Ebusuku kuvele omunye umuntu egqoke le kepisi. Ingabe uzobuye ayithole ikepisi yakhe?

books.title: Likuphi iphini lami lokuphebeza?
books.description: A boy is looking everywhere for his cricket bat. Can you help him find it?

books.title: Iqanda
books.description: UNgwenya, uFudu, uPhengwini kanye noNkukhu bathola iqanda. Ngabe iqanda labo? 'Iqanda lethu,' kusho umama nobaba ekugcineni. Thola ukuthi iqanda likabani leli.

books.title: Indlovu eyayithanda izinto
books.description: Did you know that an elephant's trunk was really short? But then how did it become so long?

books.title: Lalela umzimba wami
books.description: Each of us has a wonderful body. But have you ever listened to what it tells you?

books.title: Isikole esisehlathini
books.description: The animals in the jungle rush to the new school with great enthusiasm. What do you think happened after that?

books.title: Unogwaja ngaphansi kwesihlahla
books.description: While the rabbit is sleeping, an apple falls from the tree and the next thing he hears is 'Run, rabbit. Run.' And the pandemonium begins.

books.title: UFudu uthola ikhaya lakhe
books.description: Ngelinye ilanga uFudu wayezihambela endle. Wayefuna ndawo zonke. Wayesinga kude aphinde anciphise amehlwana otshanini......

books.title: Umndeni wezimo ezingamaPolygon
books.description: The family of Polygons come together in an attempt to know each other! Do you want to know them?

books.title: Ekoti lo Arengan lo Edoou
books.description: Ejai Manu ekoti lo itetet. Ido mam epedori adara toni apaki na enapakina, konye ijaikit nges edoou aidar... aidar... ido aidar.

books.title: Ekabaka lo Atuman Ekingok lo Esenyit
books.description: Okeere keda ekabaka lo atuman orukiator ekingok lo esenyit.

books.title: Ikingok ke Ammu
books.description: Ememei Ammu ikingok. Konye elimonikini ikepapero ebe ejataar!Ekiror ike ikingok erai Shankar,ebala kwangin. Emina Shankar ainyam etaget, ebala akes ya nen. Elimonikin ikepapero nu ipu nu ikamunitos Shankar. Ido ekotosi ikepapero abunere ore kes awanyun Shankar. Inyobo do ebeit Ammu aswam kwana?

books.title: Eimidi lo aingito
books.description: Eyapie aingito. Ido ejai totokosi akwap keda eimidi. Nginitunganan eutai ainang ngesi, aitam aijaikin ngesi aijar najokan.

books.title: Toto na Aminat.
books.description: Inera anuu amina naka Toto na mam edawun cut.

books.title: Epaperone.
books.description: Ikamunit epapero lo mam imurokini eongo cut

books.title: Rani bess bu njekkam si jangue kaii bi
books.description: Lanla Rani giss si bess bu njekkam bi si jangue kaii bi

books.title: Waxtaan yi ñuy wax bu ñuy tëdd
books.description: Nanu dann ci sunuy palante! Lii mooy li maam di wax dooman bala muy nelaw

books.title: Febarr Jongateh
books.description: Jongateh sey jangukai suma yaye, bi ko joh yaram buu tanga  wahtu bu neka beh sunu kerr yap jahasoo.

books.title: Jëfandikukat bu mag bi tudd Ammachi
books.description: Sooraj ak maamam bëgg nañoo sàkk! Déggal leen ci seen jafe-jafe bu mujj bi: jëfandikoo ay masin yu yomb ngir defar barfi cocc!

books.title: How Many?
books.description: Crawling snails, fluttering butterflies, pigs in the mud. This book has so many animals, and more keep joining in. Can you count them all? A simple book about addition.

books.title: Smile Please!
books.description: Follow the young deer as he races along with friends.

books.title: Rani's First Day at School
books.description: What does Rani see on her first day in school? How does she feel?

books.title: Fat King Thin Dog
books.description: Run along with the Fat King after the Thin Dog!

books.title: My Best Friend
books.description: Would you like to have a very special friend? Look into this book and you may find that you already have a very special friend!

books.title: My fish! No, my fish!
books.description: A funny little story about three friends and three clever fish!

books.title: It's All the Cat's Fault!
books.description: The boy in this story could not complete his homework because of a certain mischievous cat. Sounds like a silly excuse? Well, read about what happened to him, and you'll see how one thing can lead to another, and another, and another...

books.title: Annual Haircut Day
books.description: Sringeri Srinivas, the lovable farmer with very long hair, wants it cut on Annual Haircut Day. But, everyone is busy. Read this story to find out who helps him get a haircut.

books.title: Too Many Bananas
books.description: Sringeri Srinivas grows sweet bananas on his farm, and yet, no one wants to buy them. Find out what he did with them in this cute story.

books.title: Singing in the Rain
books.description: Sukhiya Kaka was a famous singer. He met Dinoo who turned out to be his biggest fan. Together they made quite a pair!

books.title: What's Neema Eating Today?
books.description: Meet Neema who LOVES to eat. Slippery lychees, squishy jamuns, sour tamarinds, shiny spinach – she loves it all! Join Neema as she chews and chomps her way through the year.

books.title: Mouse in the House
books.description: A mouse enters the house. And there is utter chaos. Here is an action-packed adventure for little ones.

books.title: No Smiles Today
books.description: Shanti was a happy girl. No one had seen her sad or quiet. Then one day she went very quiet. What had happened to Shanti?

books.title: Too Much Noise
books.description: Sringeri Srinivas, the farmer,  has to take his cows along the new highway, to the cattle fair. But the highway is just too noisy. What does he do? How does he solve this problem? Read on to find out.

books.title: Annual Haircut Day - ONCE AGAIN!
books.description: Sringeri Srinivas is back! It is  Annual Haircut Day, once again. But there is a lockdown in his village due to the Coronavirus pandemic. The barbershop is closed. What will the lovable banana farmer do this time?

books.title: The New Girl
books.description: There’s a new girl in Mira's class. Everyone calls her names because she looks ‘different’. But does everyone have to be the same?

books.title: Same-same or Different?
books.description: Can you only be friends with people who are exactly like you? Is it wrong to be best friends with someone who is different? SORT OUT the answers to these questions with Snake and Sparrow in this heartwarming story about friendship.

books.title: The Weightlifting Princess
books.description: Princess Nila is eager to win the Surya Championship, the famous weightlifting contest in her kingdom. But there are so many obstacles to overcome. Not least, a handsome prince and her parents’ expectations.

books.title: The Novel Coronavirus: We Can Stay Safe
books.description: Find out how to be smart, stay safe and support each other in the time of the new Coronavirus.

books.title: Nani's Walk to the Park
books.description: Venki's Nani has a special relationship with her neighbourhood. When Venki decides to go to the park with her, the walk turns into an adventure!

books.title: Tine and the Faraway Mountain
books.description:
Whooshoo! Whooshoo!
In the hilly town of Echali, Tine hears a whisper. It's the mountains calling to her.
As she grows up, Tine dreams of getting closer to her beloved mountains. But can she reach the top of the highest mountain in the world?
Based on the life of a mountaineer from Arunachal Pradesh, this book celebrates the power of dreams and believing in yourself.

books.title: Kali Wants to Dance
books.description:
All Kali wanted to do was dance. But how could he? After all, in his village, boys did not
dance, especially not Bharatanatyam. A story about dreams and aspirations and believing in them.

books.title: Only Fools Go to School
books.description: Sambha doesn’t want to go to school, ever. He thinks school is for fools. One day, the teacher takes him to school. He secretly enjoys himself, but will he want to return the next day?

books.title: Kaakaasaurus
books.description: Raji is having a terrible day. First, a crow gobbled up her bajji. And now it's trying to gobble up her best friend Salim! Can it get any worse? Yes, yes, it can. A WHOLE LOT worse!

books.title: Turtle Story
books.description:
Under cover of darkness, baby olive ridley turtles hatch from sun-warmed eggs on remote beaches. One of them, the little hatchling who is the narrator of our story, is delighted to make it across the beach and into the ocean without losing her way or being captured by predators. 

But can our little olive ridley survive the dangers of the ocean? Will she make it past the deadly sharks and the terrible fishing nets and reach adulthood? Will she ever have the pleasure of laying her own brood of eggs?

Find out in this charming life story of an olive ridley turtle, and meet several other interesting creatures along the way.

books.title: I Want That One!
books.description: 'Not that one', says Anil's mother when he asks for something. 'Not that one!' say all the shopkeepers in the market too. That makes the little boy very angry indeed!

books.title: Bheema, the Sleepyhead
books.description: Bheema has a problem that many of us have every morning. He just can't wake up on time! A little friend helps him. Would you like to find out how?

books.title: Bunty and Bubbly
books.description: Bunty does not like soaps. So, she refuses to clean up. Then one night she has a dream. What happens after that?

books.title: Busy Ants
books.description: Follow the ants in this book. They are sure to keep young readers busy. This book is one of the four books in the 'Animals Around Us' series.

books.title: Can and Can't
books.description: You CAN read this little book, but you CAN'T dislike it! And if little children CAN'T read it, they CAN enjoy the charming illustrations.

books.title: Look Up!
books.description: Birds and bats. Kites and planes. How often do you explore the incredible world above us? Get ready to spot the odd ones out in this wonderful book of patterns.

books.title: Maths at the Mela
books.description: Leelu is at the fair with her class of 36 students. But Sir needs to keep counting them to see how many tickets to buy and to make sure no one is lost. Is there an easier way to count to 36 than 1,2,3...? The concept of tables is introduced through a story about counting in groups.

books.title: The Roti Roll
books.description:
Bhaunkoo, the dog was given a roti. 
But was he able to eat it right away? 
Read this interesting roti travelogue and find out!

books.title: The Bee and the Elephant
books.description: An elephant tries to help a little lost bee find his home. Is it the nest? The cave? Where does he live?

books.title: Lara the Yellow Ladybird
books.description: A yellow bug in a world of red, Lara the Ladybird just wants to fit in.

books.title: Food Monster
books.description:
From roti to dosa and chakli to barfi, there are different kinds of food you can eat across India.
But have you ever thought about the shape of these food items?

books.title: Who is it?
books.description: Srr.. Srr.. Who do you think is making this sound? Priya will find out in this story!

books.title: Sam's Christmas Present
books.description: Sam wants his Christmas present now! But it is hidden in a secret place. Would you like to find out what Sam did?

books.title: What If?
books.description: When Shyam is sleepy he has trouble brushing his teeth. But dreaming big is no trouble at all.

books.title: I Can Climb!
books.description: Here, a little boy learns to climb up. But can he climb down? This book is one of the four books in the 'Growing Up' series.

books.title: The Picnic
books.description: When five friends go for a picnic they not only have a great time, they also eat new and exciting food!

books.title: The Little Leaf
books.description: Follow the journey of a little yellow-green leaf.

books.title: Piggy Wants to Fly
books.description: As Piggy gazes upon a butterfly happy in flight, Piggy dreams of flying. Can Piggy learn to fly like a butterfly?

books.title: Who Is Our Friend?
books.description: Rhino, Crocodile, Giraffe and Zebra all have an unlikely friend. Can you guess who he is?

books.title: My Garden
books.description: Join a young girl as she spends time in her beautiful garden, full of flowers, butterflies, and bumblebees.

books.title: Foxy Joxy Plays a Trick
books.description: Foxy Joxy, a sly fox, sells watermelons. One day he has a clever idea. The animals were not happy. What will they do to teach him a lesson?

books.title: Colours on the Street
books.description:
There is so much to see on a street. 
Join Sonu, Monu and Rina on a colourful walk down the lane.

books.title: Aaloo-Maaloo-Kaaloo
books.description: One day Maloo had to get some potatoes from his grandmother's kitchen garden, but he could not find any. And then Kaloo helps him to uncover the hidden potatoes.

books.title: A Street, or a Zoo?
books.description: Sonu, Monu and Rina discovered many things together in 'Colours on the Street'. In this second book, the three friends set out to play. Little did they know that they would meet so many animals. Would you like to meet them too?

books.title: The Moon and The Cap
books.description: Do you like to wear a cap on a sunny day? Find out who else likes to wear a cap in this charming book.

books.title: The Three Little Kittens
books.description: Three little kittens are afraid of the neighbourhood dog. He really wants to play with them, but whenever they see him they run away! Why do you think they are so scared of him?

books.title: I Can Help!
books.description: A big girl or boy can help others in many ways. Helping is so much fun! This book is one of the four books in the 'Growing Up' series.

books.title: My Friends
books.description: I have many friends. I like all of them but one of them is really special!

books.title: The Girl Who Could Not Stop Laughing
books.description: Every day T. Sundari gets into trouble because most things make her laugh. She just cannot keep her mouth sealed. T. Sundari wants to know if something is wrong with her. Because if there isn't, she can laugh all the time!

books.title: The Kite
books.description: Open the book. Spot the kite. See what happens to it. Enjoy the crisp lines and the Warli art.

books.title: Who Ate All That Up?
books.description: How is the forest so clean? Find out how nothing goes to waste in the jungle.

books.title: Anand
books.description: Meet Anand! He likes driving around and meeting new people. He likes music, dancing, and animals. He likes looking good, and he likes making your neighbourhood look good. He's awesome!

books.title: Sringeri Srinivas Learns to Laugh
books.description: In this book, Sringeri Srinivas, the crazy but lovable, long-haired farmer is very, very angry. What's making him so angry?  Read this fun story to find out what new problem he solves today.

books.title: Rabbit Becomes a Chef
books.description: Raw carrots for breakfast. Raw carrots for lunch. Raw carrots for dinner. Rabbit is tired of eating raw carrots and wants to learn how to cook them into a tasty curry.

books.title: Brushing is No Fun!
books.description: Rohan does not like to brush his teeth or take a bath. But his sister Riya tells him a secret that changes his mind!

books.title: Everything looks new!
books.description: So many flowers, so many colours, so many birds and squirrels chirping and jumping around Meenu! She is enchanted by nature at its best. It is spring time.

books.title: The Pig With The Runaway Tail
books.description: Pongal the pig has a bit of a problem. Her tail keeps running off on its own to have an adventure! Help Pongal find her runaway tail in this spotting book.

books.title: Best Foot Forward
books.description:
Mr. Centipede wears 21 pairs of boots on his morning walk. But with so many legs to choose from, how does he
know which foot to use first? Join Mr. Centipede and his garden friends in this story about counting and indecision!

books.title: It's a Ghost!
books.description: Once there was a ghost who loved to scare someone every day. One day, he decided to look for something easy to scare… like a mouse! Will the mouse be as frightened as everyone else?

books.title: A Cloud of Trash
books.description: A cloud of trash is hanging over Cheekoo’s head, making her the unhappiest girl in the world. Read this wonderful story to find out how Cheekoo gets rid of this horrible trash cloud.

books.title: The Shapes in Our Pookalam
books.description: Nikku and his chechi are celebrating Onam. They are making a beautiful pookalam with different flowers. Spot the different shapes they use to create it.

books.title: Little Ant's Big Plan
books.description: This is a story about a little ant with a big plan, and how his love for reading saved the day.

books.title: Going to Market
books.description: Children always like to share their experiences with others. Going to Market shows how enjoyable the experiences can be.

books.title: The Drawing Game
books.description: Jeenu and Ajji are drawing circles, triangles and squares. Then they turn them into all sorts of things. This simple story introduces the concept of shapes to children and encourages them to use their imagination.

books.title: Let's Make Some Lime Juice!
books.description: Eight children are playing in the hot sun. They want to make a jug of lime juice from the recipe Raju Uncle gives them. How do they measure out the ingredients? How do they divide the drink equally? The concept of fractions is introduced using a yummy recipe!

books.title: What Would You Like to Drink?
books.description: It is Priya Bua’s baby’s first birthday and Tara watches as each person asks Dada for coffee, tea and other things. Tara finds a smart way to help him.

books.title: You Can't Find Me!
books.description: Mia is the best in the world at hiding. Can you find her? A hide-and-seek book where you have to find Mia and the items on her Ma’s shopping list.

books.title: Tra's Red Bean Plant
books.description: Tra is excited about her birthday gift. It's three red bean seeds and a book about gardening. She plants her seeds and waters them daily. But for some reason her plant begins to droop. What could be wrong?

books.title: Dance, Mihlali!
books.description: The day of the concert is approaching, and Mihlali is getting more and more nervous. Will she ever be ready to dance in front of all those people?

books.title: Gulli's Box of Things
books.description: Gulli has a little brown box where he keeps many things like buttons and keys. But what does he do with them? Find out, and then you may want your own special box too!

books.title: Under My Bed
books.description: Sometimes strange things lurk under my bed. Would you like to know what I found the other night?

books.title: Ghum-Ghum Gharial's Glorious Adventure
books.description: Ghum-Ghum Gharial is out on her very first swim when she realizes that her family has swum off without her. Will she find them? Swim along the river Ganga with Ghum-Ghum and meet many amazing creatures along the way!

books.title: Laundry Day
books.description: It's Mary's favourite time of day – washing time! Meet Mary's neighbours as they wash their clothes and get their days off to a fresh, clean start.

books.title: Goby's Noisy Best Friend
books.description: Legless Goby and noisy Snap are best friends who live together in a burrow deep in the ocean. What happens when Goby gets tired of Snap’s loud claws?

books.title: Cube Cat, Cone Cat
books.description: The cat in this book loves shapes. Have fun following the cat and his little friend and look at all the shapes that they see.

books.title: I Spy!
books.description: A simple game of 'I Spy' at Sania's birthday party turns into a hilarious misadventure when bees and cats and dogs decide to join in. Does Sania find ALL her hidden friends in the end? COUNT DOWN with the birthday girl to find out!

books.title: A Special Nest
books.description: A bird is trying to build a nest for herself. But everywhere she builds a nest, something or the other disturbs her. What will she do?

books.title: Reba Wants Ice Cream
books.description: When Reba comes home, she realises that a shopkeeper has given her too much change. Should she tell the shopkeeper the truth?

books.title: Who is Afraid of the Rakshas Sweetie-Man?
books.description: Samar and Nivya are terrified of the Rakshas Sweetie-Man. He looks scary, and oh, does he eat little puppies? When their six puppies run into the Rakshas Sweetie-Man’s shop, the twins must rescue them. But then they get the biggest surprise ever!

books.title: Gurru and Peechu's Day Out
books.description: Gurru and Peechu have nowhere to play! Join them as they go scouting for new spaces in their city.

books.title: The Grand Patch-up
books.description: Mary and Josana are neighbours and best friends. When they have a fight, Mary wonders how to patch things up with her friend.

books.title: DIVE!
books.description: Take a dive with us into the spectacular world of coral reefs, and catch a glimpse of some strange and beautiful sea creatures!

books.title: Sailing Ships and Sinking Spoons
books.description: Tenzin and Tashi, two young Tibetan monks, and Genla, the beloved storyteller of the monastery, wonder why a small steel spoon sinks in water but a huge ship floats. Their science teacher Miss Sonam helps them experiment with an apple, a spoon and a tub-full of water to learn more about objects that float.

books.title: The Animals Meeting
books.description: Animal's Meeting is a story about the relationship between animals, humans and the environment. As spring arrives, the animals and the peasants attend meetings to discuss all the things they do for the environment. Humans are also invited to the meeting. What will they talk about? Read and find out.

books.title: Jadav and the Tree-Place
books.description: Jadav has the best job in the world: he makes forests! How does he do it? Read this book to find out!

books.title: The Boy and the Drum
books.description: A folktale about giving and kindness transforms into a lively play! This versatile and adaptable piece can be performed on stage or in the classroom. Hours of fun and learning guaranteed!

books.title: Password, please?
books.description: Manju wants to play games on her cousin’s phone. But it’s locked with a password! Here is a book that introduces readers to the concept of passwords as a key to guard information. To find out more, open the book; you don’t need a password for that!

books.title: What's That Smell?
books.description: Someone’s been eating all of Madhav and Tara’s food. Strange creatures, fuzzy monsters, or something invisible? Who could it be?

books.title: The Laddoo Code
books.description: Rahul and Ritvik’s friends always eat up their snacks. Until one day, they come up with a secret code to protect their food.

books.title: The Tiffin Gang
books.description: Meenu dislikes tiffin time because Amma always gives her idlis. But what do her classmates bring for lunch? Meenu decides to peek into their boxes and find out.

books.title: Whale in the Sky
books.description: Join Dadu and Muznah on their cloud-watching expedition, and dive into the ocean to learn about blue whales.

books.title: The Little Bird in the Big Mountains
books.description:
Meera is going to the market to buy new shoes. On the way, Meera, her brother and
Ma rescue an injured bird. A story that brings alive the sights and sounds of mountain life and
its gentle rhythms.

books.title: Puchku Seeks a Song
books.description: Puchku is off on a new adventure. The Brilliant Plans Department by Boltu, Puchku and Dodla (BPD)2 is on a mission to find a song for a baby bird. But there are too many songs to choose from.

books.title: The Magic Mirror
books.description: An evil witch curses the village, causing children to turn into scary creatures. Only Sam and Soy are free from the curse. Will Sam and Soy continue to escape the witch’s curse? Will the other children stay scary creatures forever?

books.title: Beauty Is Missing
books.description: Tessamma’s beloved buffalo is missing! No one knows what happened to her but constable Jincy is determined to find out. She goes all over the village, questioning people and looking for clues. Will Jincy be able to find Beauty the buffalo? The game is afoot in this mystery about a music-loving buffalo.

books.title: Lazy Mama
books.description: When lazy Raghu Mama claims that he can go on wild adventures without leaving his chair, Amish and Soni are amazed. How does he do it? Can Amish and Soni go on these adventures too?

books.title: Kottavi Raja and his Sleepy Kingdom
books.description:
Kottavi Raja had trouble sleeping. Only at night. During the day, when his ministers discussed complex problems, he’d find himself nodding of f. He asked everyone for remedies. Nothing seemed to work. Until... 
Travel to Kottavi Raja’s land through this book and see what happened next.

books.title: One by Two
books.description: How do you share something fairly with a friend? How do you take one thing and divide it into two equal parts? Join Rani and Jiya at the fair where they use a simple trick called One-by-Two to share a delicious meal.

books.title: Fire! Fire!
books.description: Ana misses Goa. But she finds her new home fascinating. Everything seems so different in noisy Mumbai. In some tall buildings, she sees speakers and showers. Strange! They don’t ever come on until...

books.title: The Right Way School
books.description: The Right Way School has only the right way of doing things and that’s how Mrs Gambhir teaches as well. Until one day a girl with wild hair and endless curiosity joins the school and stumps everyone with her questions, her merry voice, and her behaviour. What will happen next?

books.title: The Birthday Menu
books.description: It is Kanchi’s birthday and she can’t go out to her favourite restaurant. Knowing that baingan bharta is all she has to look forward to, she is really upset. But her neighbours in Sunrise Society know that the best way to turn things around is with a feast! A story about community, compassion, and the food we eat.

books.title: I Love Me
books.description: Rubina has just moved to a new home and doesn’t know anyone there. No one wants to play with her. Can Rubina find a friend of her own?

books.title: The Scavenger Hunt
books.description: Lajjo has to find all the items on her list in order to win Daadu’s game. The family is puzzled. Why is Daadu sending Lajjo on a scavenger hunt in the middle of a crisis?

books.title: A Stitch in Time
books.description: First, a ripped shirt and then, a faulty iron box. The day has just begun for Shyam. With everything going wrong one after the other, Shrisha takes him to a Repair Mela where you can fix almost anything.

books.title: Long Live Friendship! A Humorous Play for Children
books.description: When Vikram falls sick, Yamraj thinks its time to take him in. Vikram’s maddeningly stubborn friends think otherwise. The play takes a serious issue and presents it in a light-hearted vein. Children can easily and quickly stage and self-direct this hilarious play. Perfect for annual school days and neighbourhood events.

books.title: The Sound of Water
books.description: Varsha and her Appa live near the forest. It has been a hot summer and Varsha is feeling the heat. One day she hears a strange noise and decides to investigate. Only she can hear the sound and wonders what it is. What will Varsha find and will Appa believe her?

books.title: How Old is Muttajji?
books.description: Putta and Putti know that Muttajji is really, really old. But exactly HOW old is she? Join the twin detectives on an exciting mathematical journey through Muttajji's memories and India's history in their quest to crack the big question.

books.title: Arya in the Cockpit
books.description: Arya has always dreamt of flying. Fasten your seatbelts as she gets ready for a very special flight journey.

books.title: The Tale of the Toilet
books.description: Number one or number two, they are always big jobs! But do you ever wonder what toilets looked like in the olden times? And are they different in other countries? Get ready to take a peek into toilets across space and time!

books.title: Chipko takes root
books.description: Here is a story set in the hills that shows what bravery and grit can accomplish. Dichi, a brave Bhotiya girl takes part in the Chipko movement to save her beloved trees. Everybody in her village knows that trees give them all the important things in their life. Rapid deforestation in the Himalayan region of Alaknanda river caused floods in the 1970s and gave birth to a movement to save trees by hugging them. Read this heartwarming tale to learn the power of collective action as seen through the eyes of young Dichi.

books.title: Creatures of Old
books.description: Ever wondered what the planet was like millions of years ago? What kind of creatures roamed the Earth? What trees grew in the prehistoric forests? Well, there is a way to find out—through palaeontology, a special science that is all about digging up and unscrambling clues to the past.

books.title: How Pintu Found Pi
books.description: Pintu is lonely in his new school. Whenever he approaches his classmates, they form a closed circle. Then Pintu finds pi.

books.title: Behind the Lie
books.description: Valli and Ramesh live under a cloud of fear because of their father, who has a frightening temper. Will things ever change for them? A story about domestic violence, grit and hope.

books.title: Bulli and the Tiger
books.description: Bulli is a little girl growing up in Assam, in a basket-weavers’ community. When the bamboo suppliers threaten to raise the rates and put their whole village in jeopardy, Bulli knows she has to find other ways of finding bamboo, even if it means facing the legendary tiger!  Shalini Reys’s adventure-filled story is illustrated by Nankusiya Shyam in the Gond style.

books.title: Biju Spins Some Magic
books.description: Biju and his family are weavers in rural Odisha. They create beautiful fabrics to sell in the cities of India and abroad. This is the tale of Biju’s adventures when he accompanies his father to Delhi to sell the saris, and in the process impresses a city boy with his skill. Jaya Jaitly’s fun-filled story is illustrated by Bhramara Nayak in the patachitra style.

books.title: Our Beautiful World
books.description: Humans have been around for 2,00,000 years. But in the last 250 years, we have created a monster: climate change. This monster is making the planet hotter, and threatening the lives of those we share the planet with. How did we get here? And what comes next? This non-fiction book tells us why we should be hot under the collar about the climate crisis.

books.title: The Birthday Cake
books.description:
Azad, Haniya, Charulata and Piyush love to play in front of their house — as long as they avoid the grumpy old woman at the end of the street. One day, when they find out that it's her birthday, the four friends decide to bake her a cake. After all, no one should spend their birthday alone. 
A charming story about fraternity and empathy.

books.title: Home
books.description: Hasina and her family live happily in their rainy village. Until one day the tides turn, and Amma and young Hasina are swept away by fear. They join a river of escaping people. They become refugees in a new country, away from everything that is familiar. A story that explores the meaning of home.

books.title: Paati's Gold
books.description: Paati and Appa are worried because of the failing rice crops. But Paati has an answer hidden in a wooden box, a secret more precious than gold. Savi and Selvan watch Paati unlock the power of indigenous seeds and knowledge in this book about farming.

books.title: Janice Goes to Chinatown
books.description:
Janice sets off to Kolkata’s Chinatown along with her Grandma. Join her as she discovers this heritage
district.

books.title: An Umbrella for Druvi
books.description: Druvi needs an umbrella to protect her wings from the rain. Join the dragonfly as she searches for the perfect leaf-umbrella.

books.title: What's Ameena Up To?
books.description:
Everyone’s wondering what Ameena is up to on a sleepy Sunday afternoon. After all, where did
the coconut shell, the paint, the buttons, and newspaper go?

books.title: Sweet and Sour (Tell me now series)
books.description: Learn through interesting questions and answers.

books.title: Do and Don't
books.description: Do you think this little boy likes to go to school? If you DO want to know, just turn the pages of this book.

books.title: Have You Seen Sundari?
books.description: Dina’s best friend Sundari is hiding. Can you help her find him?

books.title: Today I Am
books.description: What will Megha be today? An explorer, an astronaut, an artist?

books.title: Drip-Drop-Drip
books.description:
What is this strange sound you can hear in 
the forest–Drip-Drop-Drip?

books.title: Animal Homes
books.description: Tall homes, tree homes, hanging homes, underground homes—visit different homes of animals, birds and insects all around you.

books.title: The Weather Report
books.description: What kind of day is it? Follow the weatherman as he braves the sun, wind and rain to give us the report!

books.title: When I Go Back Home, I See...
books.description: Every evening when Benu heads back home from school she cycles through tiny mountain paths and discovers new things. Walk home with her...

books.title: Did You Hear?
books.description: Listen carefully and you will find that birds have a lot to say.

books.title: Chunu & Munu: It's Freezing!
books.description: Chunu and Munu wake up on a freezing cold morning. They can’t find their warm clothes! Where can the clothes be?

books.title: Fishing in My Village
books.description: This picture book describes various fishing techniques – from fishing with traditional rods to using nets. The entire village in this story has gone for fishing. Let’s go fish with them!

books.title: Hide and Seek
books.description: When you play Hide and Seek with your friends, where do YOU hide? Want some ideas? Let's read this story.

books.title: Malar's Big House
books.description: Malar loves to build things. What will she build today?

books.title: Ikru's First Day of School
books.description: What will Ikru's very first day at school be like? This heartwarming, wordless book brings alive the unexpected delights and quiet fears of a child's first experience of going to school.

books.title: I Can Make Things!
books.description: There are many nice things that children can make on their own. What are they? This book is one of the four books in the 'Growing Up' series.

books.title: My Sister and Me
books.description: A short story of two sisters who fight a lot but love each other too.

books.title: Little Painters
books.description: Painting the house is such fun! But what colour should the gate be?

books.title: Is There Anyone Like Me?
books.description: Read this story about a donkey is looking for someone who is just like it!

books.title: Tell me now! - 'Good For You'
books.description: Learn through interesting questions and answers.

books.title: Hashim Saves the Mangoes
books.description: It is summer and Hashim wants to eat lots of mangoes. But they are getting spoilt. What can he do?

books.title: My Home
books.description: Welcome to my Home!

books.title: Shhh...Simmi is Listening
books.description: Simmi knows her sister Lolo very well. She can tell what Lolo is up to even with her eyes closed. Here is a simple book that introduces sound to young readers.

books.title: It's Play Time
books.description:
Rahi and her classmates are getting ready for their school play. Everyone is excited and nervous
about their performance. Will everything go as planned?

books.title: Gorillas Go to the Beach
books.description: Jump, dance, play! The gorillas are at the beach today. What else do they do there? This book introduces simple verbs in a pop of colour.

books.title: All Jumbled Up
books.description: Ammu is ready to go on stage, but she can’t remember her lines. A lot of fun follows as she jumbles up her lines.

books.title: Hippo Wants to Dance
books.description: Hippo wants to dance. Won’t anyone dance with her?

books.title: Come Stay With Me
books.description: Tendai Turtle’s Granny has hurt her shell and Mum and Dad have to go to help her. 'Come stay with me,'says Tendai’s best friend Busi Bunny, and the fun begins.

books.title: The Other Way
books.description: You don’t have to go too far to discover nature’s wonderful secrets—they are all there in your neighbourhood park. Learn about opposites in nature.

books.title: Hello, Sun!
books.description: Say hello to wonder. Say hello to millipedes, frogs, barbets and everyone under the sun who calls Earth their home. And that includes you.

books.title: Pishi and Me
books.description: Chutku returns from his walks with his aunt, his pocket full of treasures and stories. Narrated from a child’s point of view, this is the story of the heartwarming relationship between an aunt and her nephew.

books.title: Achoo!
books.description: Curious Monkey is full of questions. Everyone wants to help but sometimes the real answer is completely unexpected!

books.title: Picnic on Grass
books.description: Grass can be of different kinds. It can be soft, it can be rough, you can smell it and even taste it.  Best of all is that you can picnic on grass.

books.title: Let's Play Cricket
books.description: Rohan and Seema have to quickly build a cricket team. If they add all their friends, can they get 11?

books.title: In My Garden
books.description: It’s time to water the plants. The garden is full of colour and, if you look closely, many intricate patterns. A book about the simple joys of the outdoors world.

books.title: Walking Together
books.description: A walk to the clinic doesn’t have to be dull, when there are so many wonderful things to see on the way.

books.title: Paint Day, Plant Day
books.description: Avi enjoys plant day, music day and paint day, and being busy throughout the week. Join in as Avi potters about the house, in this book about noticing and recognising patterns.

books.title: The Little Plant
books.description: Look closely at the plants around you, there is so much to see, so many creatures to meet, and so much to learn!

books.title: Farida Plans a Feast
books.description: Join Farida as she fills her tiffin box with different items of food, and meet the animal friends she makes along the way.

books.title: This is How You Count Eggs
books.description: Raghu keeps making mistakes while counting eggs. Kavya knows a simple way to help him count.

books.title: Ammu's Puppy
books.description: Ammu does not have a puppy. But she tells her friends that she does! Her puppy's name is Shankar, she says. Shankar loves bananas, she says. She tells them so much about Shankar that her friends want to come home and meet him. Now what will Ammu do?

books.title: Rain, Rain
books.description: Roll along with the cloud as it brings rain and joy!

books.title: The Bubble Mystery
books.description: Toot-Toot is afraid of the water until she notices some funny bubbles. When she finally bathes in the pond, she sees lots of bubbles that go blop, blop, blop! Where do they come from? No one will answer when she asks. Can Toot-Toot solve the bubble mystery?

books.title: How I Feel
books.description: How do you feel when Nani comes to visit?  How do you feel when you spoil a library book? Read this book and see how you feel today.

books.title: Uma Versus Upma
books.description: Uma never eats her breakfast. Instead, she just plays with it. Can anything be done to stop her from playing with her food?

books.title: Rainbow Sambar
books.description: What should Bhavya and Paati eat today? Bhavya's favorite dish, of course – rainbow sambar! Join Paati and Bhavya for some colourful and delicious lunchtime fun.

books.title: Sniffles
books.description: It’s the day of the Famous Football Cup and poor Divya has the sniffles! Will she be able to play? Read this story to find out what happens to Divya, and also learn about how best to avoid the sniffles.

books.title: What Does Anu See?
books.description: Anu sees many lovely things around her. Do you see them too?

books.title: Annual Haircut Day- ONCE AGAIN!
books.description: Sringeri Srinivas is back! It is  Annual Haircut Day, once again. But there is a lockdown in his village due to the Coronavirus pandemic. The barbershop is closed. What will the lovable banana farmer do this time?

books.title: We Are All Animals
books.description: A nice interaction between animals and children and our capabilities!

books.title: Lassi, Ice-cream or Falooda?
books.description: Is mango panna better in taste than lassi or is falooda better than both of these? Well, the only way to find out is to enjoy these and that is what Meenu is doing! What else can you do in summer?

books.title: Keya's Day at the Beach
books.description: Join Keya the Soldier Crab as she explores the beach with her Ma, and meets many different crabs.

books.title: Chhutti
books.description: Holidays are precious! A celebration of endless summer vacations in verse.

books.title: Who Made the Tomato Chutney?
books.description:
Tara and Ravi go to the market to buy fruits and vegetables. But each time one fruit gets squashed! The concept of sorting is introduced through heavy and light objects. 
The illustrations in the book were made using bits of paper, old magazines and paper bags that were collected - not squished - under mattresses.

books.title: One, Three, Five, HELP!
books.description: A coconut beetle loves to count. He loves to spot patterns of odd numbers and even numbers. One day, he falls on his back. How many friends come to help him? An odd number of friends or an even number of friends?

books.title: How to Catch the Wind
books.description: What do wings, kites and a wind turbine’s blades all have in common? Each one’s motion is powered by the wind.

books.title: Tiger's Delicious Treats
books.description: Tiger loves baking. Every day he bakes many delicious treats, but none of the other animals in the forest want to buy from him. One day, Tiger decides to investigate.

books.title: A Kulfi for Free!
books.description: Childhood, hot summers and the narrow lanes of Jodhpur are uniquely connected to mouth-watering kulfi! How many kulfis should Bhanwari buy?

books.title: More or Less? Need to Guess!
books.description: So many mithai boxes to count, so little time! Can Ranjita and Vikram do it? Yes, using a cool math trick called 'Approximately More-or-Less'! Read this fun wedding story to learn the trick yourself!

books.title: Gul in Space
books.description: What would you like to do on your birthday? How about taking a walk in OUTER SPACE! Here’s a story that will make you jump with joy… and if there’s no gravity under you, you might just stay exactly where you are! Get ready to explore the space with Astronaut Gul.

books.title: The Elephant Bird
books.description: Munia Knew that the giant one-feathered elephant bird had not swallowed the horse, even though he was big enough to swallow one! So where had the horse disappeared? A story about a magical bird, and a brave and curious child.

books.title: The Seed Savers
books.description: Without seeds there would be no food to eat or clothes to wear. Inspired by a real-life event, this is the story of a village that comes together to open a seed bank.

books.title: Anna's Extraordinary Experiments with Weather
books.description: Anna Mani was an Indian scientist who loved to read about the world around her. Peek into her eighth birthday party and follow her through her extraordinary scientific adventures.

books.title: Dum Dum-a-Dum Biryani!
books.description: Basha and Sainabi are in a panic. Ammi is ill, and Saira aunty has just announced that she is arriving for lunch - with 23 other people! Budding chef Basha thinks he can cook Ammi's Dum Biryani, but her recipe only makes enough for 4 people. Math wiz Sainabi jumps in to help, declaring that she knows how to turn a 4-person recipe to a 24-person recipe. Do the siblings succeed in serving up a truly Dum Dum-a-Dum biryani? Read this book to find out!

books.title: The Magic Powder - A Folktale from Myanmar
books.description: Once upon a time, in a little village on the banks of the Irrawaddy river, there lived a young woman called Thuza. She was very happily married to handsome young Theingi. But there was one problem that nagged Thuza – her husband believed he would find a way to turn dirt into hold! Did he succeed? Read this delightful tale from Myanmar to find out.

books.title: The Sunshower Song
books.description: When the sun shines on a rainy day, all the animals of the forest know what’s about to happen: music and magic at the jackals’ wedding! The wedding guests each bring a scrap of sound. Some bring rhythm, and some bring tune, in this lyrical ode to the popular sunshower legend.

books.title: Teaching Pa
books.description: Diya’s Pa has never gone to school. So she decides to teach him herself. Pa listens to her most of the time, but Maths Days are difficult. How does Diya manage?

books.title: Unni's Wish
books.description: Unni wants to sleep under a fan, drink cold lime juice, and watch cartoons on TV. What’s stopping him? Read this story to find out.

books.title: Shiro's Friends Save the Day
books.description: Shiro stuffs himself with too many gulab jamuns. Now it’s up to his friends, the different parts of his digestive system, to save the day.

books.title: The Magical Glasses
books.description: Mirium and Tejas have magic glasses. Join them as they use the glasses to look at seven animals and birds that are found only in certain parts of the world.

books.title: Pranav the Pattern Detective
books.description: It is an ordinary day for Pranav until he spots something special in a tree. This discovery sets him on a journey that changes the way he views the world around him. Shapes will never look the same again.

books.title: Haru
books.description:
Meet Haru, who loves to eat, run and
play. Even though there are nights when
it’s hard to find a warm place to sleep, or
days when there isn’t enough food to eat,
Haru is always certain that tomorrow will
be better. After all, as long as there is love
and joy, it’s not a bad life!

books.title: Plants Are Everywhere
books.description: Plants grow everywhere — on high mountains, on arid lands, and even under the sea. Explore different types of plants in this book.

books.title: Hakeem's Hiccups
books.description: It’s Ramzan and Hakeem sahib has a case of the hiccups — so he can’t drink water to make it go away. What will hic-hic-hiccuping Hakeem sahib do, and can his patients help their beloved doctor?

books.title: Have You Ever Climbed a Tree?
books.description: Have you ever climbed a tree? Riniki dreams of climbing trees all over the country. Join her as she scrambles, crawls and clambers on the jackfruit, the chinar, the khejri and other trees.

books.title: Savio Finds the Right Angle
books.description: Fatima wants to finish her homework on angles. But her brother Savio drags her out to the beach. Will an afternoon outdoors help Fatima with her homework?

books.title: Making Friends with Snakes (But from a Distance)
books.description: Naagin and Dhaman are here to make friends with you, but from a distance. After all, they are snakes. Find out everything you wanted to know about these beautiful reptiles and also learn how to stay safe and let snakes slither to safety!

books.title: Goplu's Train Ride
books.description: Goplu is excited to ride on the train with Thammi, who has lots of friends and a smile for every one. Maybe today Goplu can make a friend too.

books.title: How Do Aeroplanes Fly?
books.description: Sarla wished she could fly high like an eagle or like an aeroplane. Of course you can fly, said her new teacher. Here, Sarla shares all that she has learnt about flight and aeroplanes.

books.title: Many Mangoes to Share
books.description: Four friends plant mango saplings on their first day in kindergarten. When they complete Class 4, the trees have borne hundreds of fruits. What do they do with it? Count them, and distribute them using arithmetic!

books.title: Let's Go Seed Collecting!
books.description: Join Tooka, Poi, and their best friend Inji the dog, as they go around collecting seeds. The adventure begins when the three friends meet Pacha the tamarind tree.

books.title: A Whistling Good Idea
books.description: Ma wants Nivi to turn off the pressure cooker after three whistles. But Nivi wants to read  her new book instead! Find out how she cleverly does both.

books.title: Sudipta Sengupta - The Rock Reader
